submission.author: Nan Liu
submission.name: 10L Mixed Precision
submission.blurb: 10-layer 512-dim model with lower LR (MATRIX_LR=0.02) and mixed int8/int6 compression: full int8 for first/last 3 layers, int6 (step=4 rounding) for middle layers 3-6. Fits 16MB via better compression while gaining an extra transformer layer over baseline.

PhiDelay Shared-Recurrent LM (3.23 bpb, 6.84MB)

submission.author: Bahman Masarrat
submission.name: PhiDelay-Inspired Shared-Recurrent Language Model
submission.blurb: Shared-recurrent PhiDelay-inspired language model with artifact-aware scaling and training-driven optimization under strict size constraints. Replaces self-attention with a lightweight multi-head delay mixer and reuses 3 physical blocks across 4 recurrent passes (effective depth 12) at dim=1024. Final int8+zlib roundtrip scored 3.2306 BPB under the 16 MB artifact cap.

submission.author: Spokane Way
submission.name: Training Opt Seq4096 v1
submission.blurb: SP-1024 9x512 KV4 run at TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=4096 with aggressively tuned Muon optimizer: momentum 0.99, lower LR (0.020/0.020/0.030), 3/4 batch (393K tokens), warmdown 3000 steps, and extended momentum warmup (1500 steps from 0.92). Combines long-context training with training optimization to beat the naive baseline by 0.023 BPB.

submission.author: seanward
submission.name: Int6 MLP3x + MTP + Sliding Window Eval
submission.blurb: 7-technique stack: (1) int6 per-row quantization [-31,31] with zstd-22 compression enables (2) 3x MLP expansion (hidden=1536) while fitting under 16MB. Combined with (3) seq4096 training for long context, (4) MTP auxiliary head (training-only, 1 head at weight 0.01), (5) fp16 tied embedding passthrough, (6) sliding window evaluation (stride=512), and (7) co-optimized training dynamics (MATRIX_LR=0.02, MUON_MOMENTUM=0.99, WARMDOWN_ITERS=3000). Mean sliding-window val_bpb across 3 seeds: 1.1625. MTP head excluded from artifact.

submission.author: takhir-iota
submission.name: Top2K + Sliding Window (Seed 2025)

Use eager mx.eval() to fix running train script on 16GB Mac devices
Int6 MLP3x + Tuned LR + SmearGate + SlidingWindow (val_bpb: 1.1618)

submission.author: vadim borisov (tabularis.ai)
submission.name: Int6 MLP3x + Tuned LR + SmearGate + SlidingWindow
submission.blurb: Four stacked improvements over baseline: (1) int6 per-row quantization on MLP+attention matrices with zstd-22 compression and fp16 tied embedding passthrough, enabling (2) 3x MLP expansion (hidden=1536). (3) Tuned optimizer: halved LRs (matrix_lr=0.02, scalar_lr=0.02, tied_embed_lr=0.03), higher Muon momentum (0.99 with warmup from 0.92 over 1500 steps), extended warmdown (3000 iters), gradient clipping (1.0). (4) SmearGate blending adjacent token embeddings. Sliding window eval with stride=64.

pr.title: Int6 MLP3x + Tuned LR + SmearGate + SlidingWindow (val_bpb: 1.1618)
Non-record: Looped Transformer + Per-Layer LoRA + Int6 + Sliding Window (1xH100, pending 8xH100)

submission.author: Matthew Rockwell
submission.name: Looped Transformer + Per-Layer LoRA + Int6 + Sliding Window
submission.blurb: 5 unique transformer blocks looped to 30 virtual layers with per-virtual-layer LoRA adapters on Q,V projections. Int6 quantization with fp16 embedding passthrough and sliding window evaluation. 1xH100 non-record run; pending 8xH100 validation.

pr.title: Non-record: Looped Transformer + Per-Layer LoRA + Int6 + Sliding Window (1xH100, pending 8xH100)
